quote: Ari is one of the most talented people I know. He brings a keen design expertise to every project, paired with deep empathy for the user. He's equally at home working with product, design, or engineers — most often balancing all three simultaneously.

Ari significantly improved our understanding of UX issues within the main product and spearheaded our design system initiative. His strategic understanding of design and excellent communication skills make him a visionary leader.

Ari is an exceptional product design leader who brings clarity and vision to complex projects. He fostered a supportive and collaborative environment, encouraging the team to push creative boundaries and deliver impactful designs.

Ari is a wonderfully positive and innovative designer. He pushes himself to go beyond expectations and uses his wealth of knowledge with design and human psychology to create amazing experiences. He is a great asset on any team.

What stands out about Ari is his desire and ability to focus on the true challenge and solve the problem in every possible way. Time and again, I have watched him be highly influential on teams and with clients in delivering excellent work.

Ari has been a tremendous mentor throughout my journey as a designer. He offers clear, constructive feedback grounded in real-world experience, with a unique ability to really listen, understand, and provide relevant advice.
